content:
Hello! I am a vtuber from Thailand and I have seen the Music and art files from the official materials channels.

I am unsure what the current fandom rules are in other countries and I honestly really do love the game.

I want to be able to make lore videos and chapter summaries in the future.

As such the question is what should I do when I use the official content such as using the Game's OST as BGM for Morimens streams or video

as well as just using the osts for streams/videos in general because I really do love the game and everything it has to offer. 
(The reason I ask is because this is one of the few games that I can ask for permission directly)

Do I have to turn off monetization for my morimens videos and streams?

Do I need to put any extra credits in the description other than the one that is provided in the official material channel? 

I do not wish to infringe on the game I have grown to enjoy and would love to support it with content creation. 

Thank you very much!

Thank you for your support of the game! You are free to use the official materials during your videos and streams. We would appreciate it if you could include a link to download the game in the description! We look forward to your creations!
Thank you very much!
塔维变的鼠群冲击，在下一关变成詹金的了，伤害还强制为一，那变的意义在哪

我剛剛點了好幾次才看到詞條🫠 戳右下角的主功能小圖示會比較容易成功
正在修復中
又吃兩次變3了
给的是正常的
只要是复制就一定变6
我们守密人有自己的呓语
太逆天了
繁育刻塔维复制
打出衍生的牌会变成原来的牌进牌库
然后这玩意还能复制自己
但复制自己也只是复制一次
就会出现满手牌一张都用不了的情况
神了
能看见这个不笑的也是神人了
你怎么不出牌阿.jpg
<@633215996508766229> 通曉會吃兩次變成3算力(6)；還有繁育不會被消耗
不好意思麻烦说具体一点？
1.是這張圖
2是後面繁育變出的通曉萬物之理好像被消耗的是變成的卡，使用後還是會一直存在
应该是有问题我们看看
剛剛有被這個2次戳到笑點，不過有隱形捲軸可以拉，好像是往下滑一下就可以看到全文
老鼠衝擊跟出動動作一樣
复用动作，出新的立绘和建模小人就行了，最多加点新台词和技能特效，总比从0做新角色做完还掏不出玩家的存货强。此外皮肤这个东西还能搭上繁衍狂热，新的皮肤可以多写几行字剧情。
